name: Ron Fair
abstract: Ronald Fair (born 1955) is an American record producer, record executive, musical arranger, recording engineer and conductor. A traditional record producer since 1970, Fair has been credited with orchestral production work on several commercially successful pop and R&B songs.

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: And they get this guy, Ron Fair, and he says... We’ve got do a Christmas record with you... They spent $250,000... Ron Fair says, “well we’ve got to record Avalon... we go in the studio and it’s January and we record all this
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]
